title: Extend Master Template Editor to Include PRO users
excerpt:

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Templates have been great, and I use them all the time, but when there is a new feature or any sort of change needed it is such a huge effort to have to go through every single board and make the change.
I know this feature is available on enterprise, but can I ask it is considered to extend this to Pro users too, at least. It would make getting the most out of the platform so much easier

Pretty please
